title: Non-Associated Label
text: Non-Associated Label A non-associated label is a Label that contains static text that is not associated with a Component Field. It cannot be directly addressed in ProcScript. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: lbl Main Development Object? No Part of: Component Entity Contains: Property Generalization: Label Specializations: — Compilation Output: — Specialization Non-Associated Label specializes Label in the following ways: Its name is unique within the component and is not same as a Component Field.
